_meta.keyKnowledge: We talk about how digital tools and systems help people with what they need.

_source.w: We talk about how digital tools and systems help people with what they need.
y: Understanding how technology helps people teaches us to use it wisely.
Thinking about whether technology works well helps us improve it.
We learn that good technology is designed with people's needs in mind.
eg: We talk about how a timer app helps us know when our turn is finished.
We discuss how a reading app helps someone who is learning new words.
We explore how a weather app helps people decide what to wear.
We talk about whether a classroom tool works well or could be improved.
We compare two apps that do the same thing and say which one is easier to use.
We discuss how technology helps people who have different needs or abilities.
